produce the definite integral of $ P(x) = 4x^3 + 3x^2 + 2x + 7 $ from $ x = 0 $ to $ x = 10 $, we calculate $ \int_{0}^{10} P(x) \, dx $.  
produce the result of the integration, which is $ \left[ x^4 + x^3 + x^2 + 7x \right]_0^{10} $.  
produce the value of the integral, which is $ 10000 + 1000 + 100 + 70 = 11170 $.
